claims.text: The compressed prompt reduces average prompt tokens from 2400 to 900.
The compressed prompt preserves task success on the local 20-task benchmark.
The compressed prompt has not been tested on multi-file refactors.

review_layers.text: The paper does not report token counts, making the compression claim impossible to inspect.
evidence: Paper explicitly reports token counts before and after compression.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer missed the token count table.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: Multi-file refactor behavior is unknown and must be tested.
evidence: Paper lists multi-file refactors as future work.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: A small multi-file refactor fixture can be prepared.
review_layers.next_action: Run the compressed prompt on a multi-file refactor fixture.

review_layers.text: The benchmark may be too small to show rare failures.
evidence: Paper evidence is fixture-limited but not contradicted.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: More cases may expose rare failures.
review_layers.next_action: Defer broadening until the primary missing experiment is resolved.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run the compressed prompt on a multi-file refactor fixture
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run the compressed prompt on a multi-file refactor fixture.
